title: zappania citrodora
side_effects: Zappania citrodora can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, gastrointestinal problems, and respiratory issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's essential oils can cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea. Additionally, long-term use of Zappania citrodora without proper medical supervision can lead to liver damage and other organ-related complications. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Zappania citrodora or any other herbal remedy to avoid potential health risks.
